text: Water role only. Action: During a conflict at a [element-water] province, choose a participating character – switch that character's base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill until the end of the conflict.
name: Along the River of Gold

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender, choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.
flavorText: "The kami of earth abhor corruption even more than we do. Their aid is ours for the asking."
name: Kuni Ritsuko

text: Interrupt: When a character you control would leave play – sacrifice this holding instead.
name: Iron Mine

text: While this character is attacking, each other character that has no fate on it does not count its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
flavorText: "A beautiful Empire can only be built upon beautiful laws."
name: Silver-Tongued Magistrate

text: Reaction: After the fate phase begins – look at the top 3 cards of your dynasty deck. Then, put them back in any order.
flavorText: "It was but a little I spent to save the kit, but had it cost a Fortune I would not have grudged it."
name: Togashi Mendicant

text: This character has +2[conflict-military] for each ring in each opponent's claimed ring pool.
flavorText: "I have always heard that the Lion’s greatest weapon is their pride." – Ikoma Ikehata
name: Beastmaster Matriarch

text: Reaction: After the [element-water] ring is claimed, choose a Scholar character – honor that character.
flavorText: "History is fixed, but the future flows."
name: Asako Tsuki

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: During a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor. Choose a participating character – bow that character and move it home.
name: Kanjo District

text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor – each Shinobi character you control gets +2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
name: Sake House Confidant

text: Action: Choose the topmost event in an opponent's conflict discard pile – this character gains each of that event's action abilities until the end of the phase.
flavorText: "All good artists borrow. I am a great artist."
name: Illustrious Plagiarist

text: Reaction: After you gain fate for passing in the dynasty phase – gain 1 fate.
flavorText: "The Scorpion have eyes in every court. We have eyes everywhere else."
name: Shinjo Scout

text: Action: Discard cards from your dynasty deck until you discard an Imperial card. Then, discard a card in a non-stronghold province you control and put the discarded Imperial card into that province, faceup.
flavorText: "You who would speak to the Son of Heaven would do well to speak first to me."
name: Miya Satoshi

text: Action: While attached character is participating in a conflict – reveal the top card of your conflict deck until the end of the conflict. While it remains revealed, you may play that card as if it were in your hand.
name: Pillow Book

text: Attached character gains the [clan-dragon] clan symbol and the Monk trait.
flavorText:
In the name of Togashi Yokuni,
the Enlightened,
Master of the High House of Light, and
Champion of the Dragon Clan
name: Seal of the Dragon

text: Action: Select one – place 1 fate on each unclaimed ring with no fate or remove 1 fate from each unclaimed ring.
name: Written in the Stars

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a character alone on your side - for this conflict, that character gets +3[conflict-military]. You may remove 1 fate from that character to resolve this ability twice.
name: A Legion of One

text: Seeker role only. Attach to a character you control. Action: During a conflict, remove 1 fate from attached character. Choose a participating character – treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits) until the end of the conflict.
name: Oni Mask

text: Attached character gains the [clan-unicorn] clan symbol and the Cavalry trait.
flavorText:
In the name of Lady Shinjo Altansarnai,
Seeker of the Setting Sun,
Khan of Khans,
Mistress of the Five Winds,
Daimyō of the Shinjo, and
Champion of the Unicorn Clan
name: Seal of the Unicorn

text: Keeper role only. Action: During a conflict in which you are the defending player, bow this attachment – move the contested ring to another eligible province and reveal it, if able. That province is now the attacked province.
name: Talisman of the Sun

text: Action: Remove 1 fate from each character. Draw 1 card. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText:
Autumn’s voice falters
Visions of days together
Fade with the new snow
name: Mono no Aware
